## How was it tested?

- [ ] `cargo test` passes (`src-tauri`)
- [ ] `node --test src/list-ops.test.js` passes (if frontend logic changed)
- [ ] Ran the app (`cargo tauri dev`) and verified the change by hand
- [ ] Built installers (`cargo tauri build`) — if release-relevant
